# FluxForm v0.1.1

## Updates

- Added a standard Windows installer as the primary desktop distribution path.
- The installer creates the application directory, Start Menu shortcut, and optional desktop shortcut.
- The default install path is `%LocalAppData%\Programs\FluxForm`, and users can choose another directory during setup.
- The installer supports English and Simplified Chinese.
- Release automation now builds and uploads the installer alongside CLI and WPF zip packages.

## Fixes

- Bundled FFmpeg into installer builds so installed copies do not rely on users keeping a generated `tools` folder next to the executable.
- Made FFmpeg publish downloads explicit for CI release builds.
- Fixed CI FFmpeg extraction so downloaded archives are unpacked outside the publish target before files are replaced.

## Notes

- The installer is currently unsigned, so Windows SmartScreen may show a warning on some machines.
